subtitle: Track daily expenses & stay on budget

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's total in a progress ring against daily budget, stat grid with week/month totals, top category badge, and a scrollable list of today's recent transactions with quick-add FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-add modal with a large amount stepper (increment by 1, adjustable), category picker grid with icons, payment method selector, recurring toggle, and optional note field

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Full transaction history grouped by date sections, with category filter chips at top, per-day subtotals, and swipe-to-delete. Calendar heatmap shows spending intensity by day.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: daily spending trend line chart (past 30 days), category breakdown donut chart with percentages, week-over-week comparison bar chart, spending velocity projection, and AI-style insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all entry amounts for today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all entry amounts for the current calendar week (Monday–Sunday)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all entry amounts for the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyAverageThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: monthTotal divided by number of elapsed days this month, showing average daily spend

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Each category with its total amount and percentage of overall spending for the current month, sorted descending by amount

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategoryThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The highest-spend category this week with its total amount

viewModelComputedProperties.name: budgetProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayTotal divided by dailyGoal, clamped to 0...1 for progress ring display. Over 1.0 means over budget.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days (ending yesterday or today) where daily total was at or under the daily budget goal. Resets on any over-budget day.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The longest under-budget streak ever recorded across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: spendingVelocity
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Projected monthly total: dailyAverageThisMonth multiplied by total days in current month. Indicates if user is on track to overspend.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekChange
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change between this week's total so far and last week's equivalent period total. Negative means spending less.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: noSpendDayCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of days this month with zero entries recorded, a positive frugality metric

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Past 30 days of daily totals for line chart rendering, including zero-spend days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Category name, amount, and color for donut chart segments for the current month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recentEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's entries sorted by most recent first, used for dashboard transaction list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: highest spend day this week, category increasing vs last week, velocity warning if projected over 120% of typical month, no-spend day encouragement, streak milestone celebrations

dailyGoal.description: Target maximum daily spending amount. Progress ring fills as spending approaches this limit. Green under 70%, yellow 70-100%, red over 100%.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the total spending for that day is less than or equal to the daily budget goal. Days with no entries count as under-budget (no-spend days). The streak breaks when any single day exceeds the goal.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track 7-day rolling average and compare against previous 7-day rolling average. Track 30-day monthly pace and project end-of-month total. Compare category proportions week-over-week to detect shifts in spending habits (e.g., food percentage rising).
insights: Velocity warning: 'At this pace, you'll spend $X this month' when projected > 120% of last month's total
Category spike: 'Shopping is up 45% vs last week' when any category increases >30% week-over-week
No-spend celebration: 'Great job! 3 no-spend days this month' when noSpendDayCount increases
Streak milestone: 'You've been under budget for 7 days straight!' at 3, 7, 14, 30 day marks
Top expense alert: 'Food & Dining is 40% of your spending this month' when any single category exceeds 35%
Daily comparison: 'You spent $12 less today than your daily average' when today differs significantly from mean
Weekend pattern: 'You tend to spend 60% more on weekends' when weekend average > weekday average * 1.3
